'''âv-k-k-m''' ('''kavakemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flecker|flecker]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flecker|flecker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-k-k-m
|-
! Lemma
| kavakemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivakemoko|thivakemoko]] || [[word:jivakemoko|jivakemoko]] || [[word:shivakemoko|shivakemoko]] || [[word:kivakemoko|kivakemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvakemoko|thuthuvakemoko]] || [[word:jujuvakemoko|jujuvakemoko]] || [[word:shushuvakemoko|shushuvakemoko]] || [[word:kukuvakemoko|kukuvakemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvakemoko|thuvakemoko]] || [[word:juvakemoko|juvakemoko]] || [[word:shuvakemoko|shuvakemoko]] || [[word:kuvakemoko|kuvakemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvakemoko|thuvakemoko]] || [[word:juvakemoko|juvakemoko]] || [[word:shuvakemoko|shuvakemoko]] || [[word:kuvakemoko|kuvakemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevakemoko|thevakemoko]] || [[word:jevakemoko|jevakemoko]] || [[word:shevakemoko|shevakemoko]] || [[word:kevakemoko|kevakemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovakemoko|thothovakemoko]] || [[word:jojovakemoko|jojovakemoko]] || [[word:shoshovakemoko|shoshovakemoko]] || [[word:kokovakemoko|kokovakemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovakemoko|thovakemoko]] || [[word:jovakemoko|jovakemoko]] || [[word:shovakemoko|shovakemoko]] || [[word:kovakemoko|kovakemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovakemoko|thovakemoko]] || [[word:jovakemoko|jovakemoko]] || [[word:shovakemoko|shovakemoko]] || [[word:kovakemoko|kovakemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvakemoko|thĂŠvakemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvakemoko|jĂŠvakemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvakemoko|shĂŠvakemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvakemoko|kĂŠvakemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavakemoko|thathavakemoko]] || [[word:jajavakemoko|jajavakemoko]] || [[word:shashavakemoko|shashavakemoko]] || [[word:kakavakemoko|kakavakemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavakemoko|thavakemoko]] || [[word:javakemoko|javakemoko]] || [[word:shavakemoko|shavakemoko]] || [[word:kavakemoko|kavakemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavakemoko|thavakemoko]] || [[word:javakemoko|javakemoko]] || [[word:shavakemoko|shavakemoko]] || [[word:kavakemoko|kavakemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
